2605.01100.title: A Knowledge-Driven LLM-Based Decision-Support System for Explainable Defect Analysis and Mitigation Guidance in Laser Powder Bed Fusion
2605.01100.paper_summary: This work presents a knowledge-driven decision-support system that integrates structured defect knowledge with LLM-based reasoning to provide explainable defect diagnosis and mitigation guidance in manufacturing, using LPBF as a representative, safety-critical case study. The proposed ontology-integrated LLM-based decision support system for LPBF defect analysis and mitigation guidance is built on a knowledge base containing 27 known LPBF defect types organized into hierarchical categories and causal relationships. The developed system supports fuzzy natural language queries for systematic knowledge retrieval, literature-supported explanation of defects, and guidance on defect causes and mitigation strategies derived from encoded process knowledge. Furthermore, a multimodal image-assessment module based on foundation models enables descriptor-guided interpretation of representative microscopic defect images through semantic alignment scoring. The proposed framework was evaluated through qualitative comparisons with general-purpose vision-language models, an ablation study, and an inter-rater reliability analysis. Evaluation on the literature-derived dataset showed that the fully integrated configuration outperformed the other three evaluated system configurations, achieving a macro-average F1 score of 0.808. Additionally, inter-rater reliability analysis using Cohen's kappa indicated substantial agreement between the model outputs and the literature-derived reference labels. These findings suggest that ontology-guided knowledge representation can improve the consistency, interpretability, and practical usefulness of LLM-assisted LPBF defect analysis.
2605.01100.paper_summary_zh: 這項工作提出了一個知識驅動的決策支持系統，將結構化的缺陷知識與基於LLM的推理相結合，以提供可解釋的缺陷診斷和減緩指導，並以LPBF作為代表性、安全關鍵的案例研究。所提出的集成本體的基於LLM的決策支持系統用於LPBF缺陷分析和減緩指導，建立在包含27種已知LPBF缺陷類型的知識庫上，這些缺陷類型被組織成層級類別和因果關係。所開發的系統支持模糊自然語言查詢，以進行系統化的知識檢索、文獻支持的缺陷解釋，以及根據編碼的過程知識提供的缺陷原因和減緩策略指導。此外，基於基礎模型的多模態圖像評估模塊通過語義對齊得分實現了對代表性微觀缺陷圖像的描述符引導解釋。所提出的框架通過與通用視覺-語言模型的定性比較、消融研究和評估者間可靠性分析進行了評估。對文獻衍生數據集的評估顯示，完全集成的配置在其他三個評估的系統配置中表現最佳，達到了0.808的宏觀平均F1分數。此外，使用Cohen's kappa的評估者間可靠性分析顯示模型輸出與文獻衍生參考標籤之間存在實質性一致性。這些發現表明，本體引導的知識表示可以提高LLM輔助LPBF缺陷分析的一致性、可解釋性和實用性。
2605.01100.author: Basit Mahmud Shahriar et.al.
2605.01100.authors: Basit Mahmud Shahriar, Md Habibor Rahman
